UnparsedAddress.description: a full address to get instant offer
UnparsedAddress.default: 4417 Powells Point Rd, Virginia Beach, VA 23455

offer_request_status.description:
Offer request statuses:
 * `in_submission` - Offer request is incomplete.
 * `initial_offer` - Offer request has complete property details, and has received an instant preview offer, but not yet submitted to the marketplace.
 * `active` - Offer request is active in the marketplace and receiving cash offers.
 * `expired` - Offer request has expired and is ready to be renewed.
 * `denied` - Offer request does not meet our criteria, and has been denied.
 * `under_contract` - Offer request is currently under contract with a buyer.
 * `closed` - Offer request has successfully closed after previously being under_contract.
 * `processing` - Offer request is currently retrieving property data or buyer filtering is occurring.

offer_request_is_mls.description: Is the property for the offer request listed on MLS

offer_request_is_approved.description: Field is true after we have approved the offer request to be sent to buyers.

inventory_property_id.description: Used to uniquely identify the property in our system. Can safely ignore

matchCount.description: Number of buyers your submission matched

buyBoxesCount.description: Number of buy boxes your submission matched

buyer_pays_buyer_broker_commission.description: If true, buyer pays the buyer broker commission equal to 3% of the offer amount. If false, seller will pay the buyer broker commission equal to 3% of the offer amount.

buyer_pays_listing_broker_commission.description: If true, buyer pays the listing broker commission set by the agent. If false, seller will pay listing agent commission.

buyer_pays_buyer_broker_commission.description: If true, buyer pays the buyer broker commission equal to 3% of the offer amount. If false, seller will pay the buyer broker commission equal to 3% of the offer amount.

buyer_pays_listing_broker_commission.description: If true, buyer pays the listing broker commission set by the agent. If false, seller will pay listing agent commission.

offer_type.description: The category of offer. Options include: 'quality_cash', 'auto_cash', 'cash', 'mls', 'ibuyer', 'custom', 'instant', and 'instant_premier'.
